_comment: Your curated shortlist of GOOD entry projects for the exiting party after decoupling — chosen for location, transport (within ~800m MRT/LRT), rental demand, 70+ yr remaining lease, and capital-appreciation upside. ura_update.py pulls each project's recent transactions from URA and writes a realistic ENTRY price (20th percentile) into the calculator's PROJECTS list. 'name' MUST match URA's exact project spelling (find it on https://eservice.ura.gov.sg/property-market-information/pmiResidentialTransactionSearch). 'region' is OCR / RCR / CCR. 'why' is your one-line rationale shown to clients. Add, remove, and edit freely — this is your professional pick list.

projects.name: Riverfront Residences
projects.why: Hougang riverfront, near Hougang MRT & Defu; value entry, steady rental demand

projects.name: The Tapestry
projects.why: Tampines, full facilities; HDB-upgrader catchment, resilient rental

projects.name: Affinity At Serangoon
projects.why: Serangoon, large project; value entry with North-East line connectivity

projects.name: The Florence Residences
projects.why: Hougang/Kovan, mega clubhouse concept; upgrader demand, rentable

projects.name: Treasure At Tampines
projects.why: Mega project by Tampines West MRT; strong upgrader & rental demand

projects.name: Parc Clematis
projects.why: Clementi, near MRT; rides west growth (JID/JLD), good rentability

projects.name: Parc Esta
projects.why: Eunos MRT, city-fringe; high tenant demand, appreciation track record

projects.name: Normanton Park
projects.why: Kent Ridge MRT, near one-north/Science Park; biz-hub rental base

projects.name: Stirling Residences
projects.why: Queenstown MRT, prime city-fringe; strong appreciation & rental

projects.name: Jadescape
projects.why: Marymount MRT, central; quality build, long-run appreciation

projects.name: Soleil @ Sinaran
projects.why: Novena MRT (D11), 99-yr; value CCR entry, strong medical-hub rental
